_note: Multi-vendor frontier config for run_vendor_ladder.py. API keys are read from env at runtime (OPENAI_API_KEY / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / GEMINI_API_KEY); no secrets here. Models whose provider key is unset are skipped. IMPORTANT: verify each `model` id exists on YOUR account (use the models.list() one-liners in the README) and edit accordingly. Ordered cheap->top per vendor so a partial run still yields a comparison. Reasoning models (gpt-5.x / o-series / claude-opus with thinking) cost more and may ignore temperature; keep seeds low for those. Real-LLM runs are NOT part of `make repro`.
